title: Hammered Copper Water Jug, 1.5L
shortDescription: Hand-hammered pure copper jug, said to help alkalize stored water.
description: A 1.5-litre pure copper jug, hand-hammered by metalworkers in Howrah. Many households use copper vessels to store drinking water overnight. Hand wash only; a natural patina will develop over time and can be polished away with lemon and salt if preferred.
